params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 you V10-B HTML SSR envelope per #700 PARTIAL verdict (V10-A you_json wrong format — /search?q= route returns SSR HTML 61KB). V10-B: HTML response with embedded Korean warning rendered as visible page (no SPA dependency). Spec: proposals/you-V10B-HTML-SSR-envelope-spec-2026-05-06.md.

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt — observe URL transition to /search?q=...
3. Network: response Content-Type should be text/html; charset=utf-8
4. Browser should render HTML directly: '⚠️ 민감정보 차단' heading + warning text
5. Mission protection: PII not decoded in body

verdict_criteria.OK: Korean warning HTML page rendered + no SPA error fallback
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_browser_renders_but_SPA_override: HTML received but Next.js SPA hijacks render — escalate to V10-C
verdict_criteria.FAIL: engine doesn't fire OR new error

notes: 48차 you V10-B HTML SSR envelope verification. Hypothesis HP-V10-B1: /search?q= is standard Next.js page route returning HTML to browser, not JSON to SPA.
